steps.t: Léothred can be found in Misthallow on the path towards Ered Mithrin. You should talk to Léothred on the path towards Ered Mithrin.
Léothred can be found in Misthallow on the path towards Ered Mithrin. You should bring the meats to Léothred.
Léothred can be found at the gates of Erebor. You should talk to Léothred at Erebor.
